name: user-story
description: Evaluations for user-story skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user asks to write user stories or manage backlog

prompts.reason: Exact trigger phrase listed in skill description

prompts.input: Write user stories for the new checkout feature
prompts.reason: Explicit 'write stories' trigger in context of a feature

prompts.input: Help me define acceptance criteria for the search functionality
I need to create a user story mapping session for our onboarding flow
Organize and prioritize our product backlog
prompts.reason: Exact trigger phrase 'backlog' in product management context

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for implementation or requirement analysis tasks

prompts.reason: Implementation request, not user story writing

prompts.input: Analyze requirements for the new dashboard
prompts.reason: Requirement analysis is a different skill, not user story creation

prompts.input: Tell me about agile story points estimation techniques
prompts.reason: Educational question about agile concepts, not a request to create user stories
